name: Powersink Stone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>能</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>吸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>収</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each time a monster effect is activated, place 1 Spellstone Counter on this card when that effect resolves (max. 2). While this card has 2 Spellstone Counters, neither player can activate the effects of face-up monsters on the field, also the effects of face-up monsters on the field are negated. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card has any Spellstone Counters: Remove them.
eff: Each time a monster effect is activated, place 1 Spellstone Counter on this card when that effect resolves (max. 2). While this card has 2 Spellstone Counters, neither player can activate the effects of face-up monsters on the field, also the effects of face-up monsters on the field are negated. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card has any Spellstone Counters: Remove them.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Onslaught of the Fire Kings

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
